title: Write integration tests for real workflows with @workflow/vitest
description:
Replace mock-heavy coverage of workflow runtime behaviour with real integration tests using @workflow/vitest.

Current state: cars.test.ts and coe.test.ts mock the entire 'workflow' module. This verifies orchestration branching but not durable runtime behaviour (retries, hooks, step replay, error classification, sleep).

The only real integration test (cars.integration.test.ts) uses a toy testCalculateWorkflow — no real workflow is covered.

Work:
- Integration tests for carsWorkflow covering: happy path (records processed, post generated), post-exists skip path, retry on 429, fatal on 401/403
- Integration tests for coeWorkflow covering the equivalent paths
- Note: vi.mock() does NOT work in integration tests (esbuild bundles steps). Inject seams via workflow args / env vars / test doubles at the boundary instead
- Use start(), run.returnValue, run.status from workflow/api

Acceptance:
- At least one integration test per real workflow (cars, coe, deregistrations, electric-vehicles, regenerate-post)
- Tests pass under pnpm test:integration
- Error paths (retry/fatal) exercise real RetryableError/FatalError classification

title: Add test:integration script for Vercel Workflows
description:
Wire up the @workflow/vitest integration config so it can actually run.

Current state: apps/web/vitest.integration.config.ts exists with the workflow() plugin, but no npm script runs it. pnpm test only runs unit tests.

Work:
- Add 'test:integration' script to apps/web/package.json: vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
- Add a 'test:integration:watch' variant
- Ensure integration tests are excluded from the default test run (already done via exclude pattern in vitest.config.ts)
- Verify it runs locally with the existing cars.integration.test.ts

Acceptance:
- pnpm test:integration runs only *.integration.test.ts files
- pnpm test still excludes them
- Existing testCalculateWorkflow passes

title: Include heroImage in blog post queries
description: In apps/web/src/queries/posts.ts (or equivalent), ensure getPostBySlug, getAllPosts, and getRecentPosts include the heroImage column in their select projection. Since SelectPost auto-infers from schema this may only require verifying '.select()' calls or adding the column explicitly where partial selects are used.
acceptance_criteria: getPostBySlug returns heroImage; no regression in existing post queries; related tests updated if any

title: Render hero image in BlogHero + blog post page
description: In apps/web/src/app/(main)/(site)/blog/components/blog-hero.tsx: accept optional heroImage prop, render next/image as background with gradient overlay for title/metadata legibility when present. Fallback (null heroImage) preserves current text-only layout — no regression on old posts. In apps/web/src/app/(main)/(site)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx: pass post.heroImage to BlogHero. Consider also showing thumbnail on /blog index cards (separate follow-up).
acceptance_criteria: Posts with heroImage render image in hero; posts without fall back to text-only; mobile + desktop both tested; no layout shift on load

title: Wire hero image into generate-post + save-post
description: In packages/ai/src/generate-post.ts: after generateContent, call generateHeroImage with the generated title/excerpt/dataType/slug. Wrap in try/catch — failure is best-effort, heroImage stays null. Pass heroImage to savePost. In packages/ai/src/save-post.ts: add heroImage to PostParams and persist in both .values() and .onConflictDoUpdate.set(). Also applies via regenerateBlogContent path (shared saveGeneratedPost).
acceptance_criteria: generate-post.ts calls generateHeroImage; save-post.ts writes heroImage column; failure in image generation does not fail the post save; WDK workflow still completes
close_reason: Wired generateHeroImage call into saveGeneratedPost with try/catch (best-effort — failure leaves heroImage null). heroImage added to PostParams and persisted in both .values() and .onConflictDoUpdate.set(). Step boundary remains in the workflow layer (existing generateCarsPost etc.) per Vercel WDK pattern — no use step added to shared package.

title: Add heroImage column to posts schema
description: Add 'heroImage: text()' column to packages/database/src/schema/posts.ts. Run pnpm --filter @sgcarstrends/database generate to produce migration SQL, review, then pnpm db:migrate. Nullable column — existing posts remain valid with null hero.
acceptance_criteria: heroImage column exists in posts table; migration file committed; SelectPost type includes heroImage: string | null
close_reason: hero_image column already exists via migration 0019_sparkling_magus.sql; schema.ts updated to declare heroImage: text() so Drizzle types stay in sync

title: generate-hero-image.ts using gpt-image-2 via AI Gateway
description: Create packages/ai/src/generate-hero-image.ts. Use experimental_generateImage from 'ai' with model 'openai/gpt-image-2', size '1536x1024', providerOptions.openai.quality='high', providerOptions.gateway.tags for observability. Decode result.images[0].base64 with Buffer.from, pass to uploadBlogHeroImage. Prompt template anchors on Navy Blue palette, Singapore context, post title+excerpt.
acceptance_criteria: generateHeroImage exported; returns {url}; uses gateway model string; prompt template lives in config.ts alongside INSTRUCTIONS/PROMPTS
close_reason: Added packages/ai/src/generate-hero-image.ts using gateway.imageModel('openai/gpt-image-2') via @ai-sdk/gateway, with HERO_IMAGE_INSTRUCTION + HERO_IMAGE_SUBJECTS prompt composition and upload via uploadPostHeroImage. pnpm typecheck clean across all 7 packages.

title: Blob upload helper in packages/ai/src/blob.ts
description: Create uploadBlogHeroImage(slug, buffer, contentType) in packages/ai/src/blob.ts using @vercel/blob put() with access:'public', cacheControlMaxAge 1 year, allowOverwrite:true, pathname 'blog-hero/{slug}.{ext}'. Mirrors packages/logos/src/services/blob.ts. Add @vercel/blob@2.3.0 to packages/ai/package.json.
acceptance_criteria: uploadBlogHeroImage exported from @sgcarstrends/ai; returns {url, pathname}; unit test with mocked put()
close_reason: uploadPostHeroImage helper added to packages/ai/src/blob.ts using posts/hero/{slug}.{ext} prefix; @vercel/blob@2.3.0 pinned to match packages/logos

title: Blog hero images via gpt-image-2 (epic)
description: Generate one editorial hero image per blog post using openai/gpt-image-2 via Vercel AI Gateway. Store in Vercel Blob, persist URL in posts.heroImage, render in BlogHero. Replaces the removed static Unsplash heroes with unique per-post imagery. See plan at ~/.claude/plans/let-s-plan-this-pure-duckling.md.

title: Run workflow integration tests in CI
description:
Wire pnpm test:integration into the checks.yml GitHub Actions workflow so integration tests run on every PR.

Prerequisites: depends on the test:integration script being added.

Work:
- Add a job (or step) to .github/workflows/checks.yml that runs pnpm test:integration
- Pin any action SHAs per the supply-chain hardening convention
- Ensure Turbo caching works so it only re-runs when workflow code changes
- Verify it runs in reasonable time (testTimeout is 60s per test)

Acceptance:
- CI fails when an integration test fails
- CI run time is not significantly impacted for PRs that don't touch workflows

title: Review and reduce barrel files across @sgcarstrends packages
description:
Audit the barrel files currently in packages and remove them where practical, leaving only what genuinely benefits from a single entry point.

Current barrels:
- packages/ai/src/index.ts
- packages/database/src/index.ts
- packages/logos/src/index.ts
- packages/types/src/index.ts
- packages/utils/src/index.ts

Each re-exports submodules via 'export * from ./xxx'. Downsides: worse tree-shaking, slower tsc, hidden circular imports, harder call-graph navigation.

Approach:
1. For each package, list public consumers (grep for '@sgcarstrends/<pkg>' imports across the monorepo)
2. For modules used cross-package, add subpath exports in package.json ('"./foo": "./src/foo.ts"') and migrate call sites to '@sgcarstrends/<pkg>/foo'
3. Drop the corresponding 'export *' lines; keep the barrel only if a package genuinely needs a single flat entry (e.g. packages/types — shared type aggregator may stay)
4. Ensure pnpm build + lint + typecheck + test green per package

Note: packages/types might be the one legitimate case to keep — review on a per-package basis rather than forcing a blanket removal.
acceptance_criteria: Each package re-evaluated; barrels removed where practical; remaining barrels documented with justification; subpath exports wired up; monorepo build/lint/test all green
